title: Archive
seo_title: Client Site Archive — Denver WordPress Developer | Austin Schuetz
seo_description: A decade of freelance and agency web work from a Denver WordPress developer. Live sites and Wayback-preserved builds, grouped by era.

blocks.heading: A decade of sites, kept honest.
blocks.lede_md: Before the products, I built websites for people. Freelance in Denver, then agency work, then in-house at a studio. This is the record.

blocks.body_md:
Client work has a shelf life. Businesses rebrand, agencies redesign, domains lapse. Many of the sites below have since been retired or replaced — so where the original is gone, I've linked the **Wayback Machine** snapshot instead of pretending it's still live.

Thumbnails from redesigned sites are the archived versions of *my* work, not whatever stands there now. No dead links, no borrowed credit. Just what I built, and when.

blocks.heading: Need a site built or rescued?
blocks.body_md: I still take on front-end and WordPress work for Denver clients and remote teams. New build or a rebuild of something that's aged out — either works.
